resources.string: Quick access to Camera and Vault
Authenticate to access your private data
Fix grammar and spelling. Return only the corrected text — no preamble, no explanation.
Rewrite the text below to keep the same meaning but improve clarity and flow. Return only the rewritten text.
Summarize the text below in 2–3 sentences. Return only the summary.
Rewrite the text below in a formal, professional tone suitable for business correspondence. Return only the rewritten text.
Rewrite the text below in plain, simple language anyone can understand. Return only the rewritten text.
Translate the text below to %1$s. Return only the translation.
Expand the text below into a longer, more detailed version while keeping the same intent. Return only the expanded text.
Convert the text below to a clean bulleted list of the key points. Return only the bullet list.
Ask me anything about your data, or paste text to summarize or rewrite.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
I couldn\'t find any photos for \"%1$s\".
Here are some photos from your vault.
No expenses logged for this %1$s yet.
Capture a front camera photo on wrong PIN attempts
Open this URL on your PC browser and enter the PIN to upload files directly to your vault.
Tap vault title %d times to reveal. Content is not searchable.
App appears as \"Calculator\" in launcher. Enter your PIN + = to unlock.
New PIN must be different from current
New PIN can\'t match your emergency PIN
Use arrows to reorder. Disabled features are hidden from home.
Link a note to a person to find it fast later.
Search your vault by label: try \"dog\", \"beach\", or \"receipt\".
Face groups auto-name from your People contacts.
Emergency PIN shows a fake empty vault — set it in Advanced Settings.
Tap the timer icon in Camera to set a self-timer before capture.
Long-press a photo in the vault to enter multi-select mode.
The vault detects duplicates and blurry photos for quick cleanup.
Enable AI Assistant in Advanced to unlock the sparkle menu in notes.
Voice notes are encrypted with the same keys as your text notes.
Toggle checklist mode in a note to turn it into a tap-to-complete list.
All AI processing runs on-device. No data is ever sent anywhere.
Advanced Settings are PIN-protected — critical actions stay safe.
Backups are saved to your Downloads folder for easy transfer.
The QR screen has a Generate tab — create WiFi, vCard, and more.
Tune face grouping sensitivity in Settings → Camera.
Tap ✨ in the top bar to chat with the AI Assistant — runs entirely on-device.
Ask the AI Assistant to summarize your week or list pending reminders.
The AI can create reminders, notes, and expenses from a single sentence.
Inside any note, tap ✨ to summarize, rewrite, fix grammar, or extract tasks.
Use AI Translate for full-sentence context — better than word-by-word lookup.
Tap the refresh icon in Settings to re-run the calibration wizard any time.
Pinch with two fingers in the Camera to zoom — works in photo and video modes.
Add the Quick Note widget to your home screen for one-tap capture.
Voice notes use hardware noise suppression — toggle in Settings → Privacy.
Send files from your computer with one QR scan — Vault → 📶 icon. No cloud.
A note with multiple voice clips? Tap \"Play all\" to hear them in sequence.
On-device AI is off. Enable it to get photo descriptions, smart tags, voice replies, document summarization, and the AI Assistant chat.
Downloading the AI model. Once finished, AI features will appear here.
These settings apply to the Detect feature and capture button.
Show object labels and AI actions when viewing photos in the vault.
Speaks Detect descriptions out loud after they\'re generated. You can also tap the speaker icon next to any description to replay it.
No text-to-speech engine available — install one to use read-aloud.
Export an encrypted backup or move to a new device.
Update your unlock PIN or biometric.
Generates AI descriptions and tags in the background after each new photo is saved. Battery-intensive — ~10 sec per photo on the Gemma vision engine.
Generates AI descriptions and tags for every vault photo that doesn\'t have them yet. Tap while running to cancel.
Estimated time: ~%1$d minute(s) on the AI engine.
Will process %1$d photo(s) this run (~%2$d minute(s)).
Delay before capture (tap timer icon in camera to enable)
Video length when using countdown timer in video mode
This will permanently delete %1$d items. This action cannot be undone.
Clear AI labels and re-analyze all vault photos

This will clear all AI labels, face groups, and photo tags — including any AI descriptions and AI tags generated by Gemma vision. The basic labels and face groups will be rebuilt when you open the vault; to restore Gemma descriptions and tags, run "Process all photos with AI" afterward. Continue?
Index cleared. Open Vault to re-index.
Wipe face-group names and identities. Keeps photo embeddings, AI tags, and descriptions — re-clusters from existing data, no re-indexing.
All current face-group names and contact links will be cleared. Photo embeddings and AI tags are kept; groups will be re-clustered automatically next time you open the Faces screen. Continue?
Face groups reset. Open the Faces screen to re-cluster.
Download text-recognition language models for the scanner and Assistant.
Each language is downloaded on demand and stored on this device. Multiple languages can be active at once — Tesseract reads mixed-script documents in one pass.
No OCR languages installed. Open Settings → OCR languages to download one.
Camera access is needed to scan documents.
Drag the corners to outline the document
Enabled \u2014 screenshots and screen recording blocked
Disabled \u2014 screenshots and screen recording allowed
AI couldn\'t analyze this scan. The original file is still saved.
An existing folder or a new one will be created.
Tap to choose a different folder
Couldn\'t read text from this PDF.
I couldn\'t answer that against the document — try rephrasing or detach the document to ask a general question.
Reach the AI Assistant from Home without entering the PIN. Chat runs in text-only mode — your notes, expenses, photos and contacts stay locked.
Vault locked — text-only mode. Unlock to use your notes, expenses, photos and contacts.
Your vault is locked. Tap Unlock above to access your data.
Your vault is locked, so I can\'t save that yet. Tap Unlock above and ask again to record it.
Camera permission is required to take photos.
Pick a photo from your vault
No photos in your vault yet.
Couldn\'t read text from this PDF (scanned images of non-Latin script, or pages without text). Try a different document.
Voice input isn\'t available on this device.
Microphone permission is needed for voice input.
Read assistant replies aloud using your device\'s text-to-speech. Tap the speaker icon on a reply to replay it; the mic icon in the input row dictates your question.
After a scan saves, AI suggests a filename, folder, and extracts key fields (receipt total, contact info, etc). ~5 sec per scan, battery-intensive.
Create a PIN that shows empty vault when entered
How long to wait before locking the vault when you leave the app.
\u26A0 Storage is low! Consider clearing cache or deleting old vault items.
Enabled \u2014 GPS, device info, timestamps removed from all shared images
Automatically blur faces before sharing photos
No analytics, no telemetry. Network used only for on-device model downloads (Gemma, Tesseract OCR language packs).
Vault data excluded from device backups
Transfer photos, videos, and notes to a new phone
Your data is encrypted with a key unique to this phone. Use backup to transfer data when changing phones.
Version %1$s \u2022 Private camera + encrypted vault. Optional on-device AI.
View local crash reports \u2014 never sent anywhere

All AI processing runs on your device. Photos and notes are AES-256-GCM encrypted with a per-install key stored in your phone\'s hardware security module. No data is sent to any server. No analytics. No telemetry.
Authenticate to access your health data
No contacts to link yet. Add someone in People first, then come back here to link them as a health profile.
Tap + to log your first cycle. Predictions appear after a couple of cycles.
Estimate based on default — log more cycles for accuracy.
Privora is not a medical device. Cycle tracking is for personal records only.
Predictions are simple averages — not medical advice, contraception guidance, or fertility tracking.
To fire reminders exactly on time, Privora needs permission to schedule exact alarms. You\'ll be taken to system settings to grant it.
The chosen time is in the past.
No days selected — fires every day.
No habits configured. Tap + to add.
Send PDF via email, messaging, etc.
Too many attempts. Try again in %1$s
Letters A–Z and digits 2–7. Spaces ignored.

%1$s will be removed from this Authenticator.\n\nIf you re-enable 2FA on the service afterward, the service may issue a new secret — that can lock out any other device or backup that still has the old secret. Make sure you have a recovery code or another working device first.
Anyone who scans this QR will get permanent access to this account\'s 2FA codes. Only show it on a screen you trust.
Tap Reveal to show the QR.
Close this dialog as soon as the other device has scanned.
An entry with the same secret already exists: %1$s.
Replace updates the existing entry. Keep both adds a duplicate (codes will match).
Codes appear as ••• ••• until you tap an entry. Useful in shared spaces.

Codes are computed from a shared secret and the current time. Anyone with your secret has permanent access — Privora keeps secrets encrypted on this device only, with no cloud sync. If a service rejects your code, check that your phone\'s clock is set to network time.
\"%1$s\" and all its contents will be permanently deleted.
⚠️ OCR reads Latin scripts only. Arabic, Chinese, etc. content (if any) is missing.
No text was extracted from this document.
%1$d characters — all of it reaches the Assistant.
%1$d characters total — only the first %2$d reach the Assistant.
Text extracted (%1$d characters). Ask the Assistant ready.
Text extracted from %1$d pages. Ask the Assistant ready.
No readable text found in this PDF.
Couldn\'t extract text from this PDF.
A file with that name already exists.
No vault data yet — there\'s nothing to back up.
Includes app settings, feature toggles, language, layout, and all module preferences.
%1$d documents queryable by the AI Assistant
Open a new note in one tap
Camera, Vault, Notes, and Reminders in one row
Downloading the on-device Gemma 4 model so AI features work offline.
This note will be permanently deleted.
No people added yet. Add someone in People first.
AI-powered camera that runs entirely on your device.\nNo data is ever sent to any server.
All AI processing happens on-device.\nPhotos and notes are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.\nNo analytics. No telemetry. No cloud.
Translation models downloaded once, then offline
Choose how you want to protect your encrypted vault and notes.
Separate PIN just for this app. Enables Emergency PIN feature.
PIN must be at least 4 digits
You can set up an Emergency PIN in Settings.
Your vault is secured with %1$s.%2$s\nAll photos and notes will be encrypted automatically.
This PIN protects your vault and secure notes.\nChoose at least 4 digits.
All processing happens on your device.\nNo data is sent anywhere.
Index more photos to detect faces
You can change this later in Settings.
All features as cards on a 2-column home page.
Bottom tab bar with the features you use most.
Uncheck what you don\'t need. Use the arrows to reorder.
We measure RAM and inference speed to decide if AI features will run smoothly.
Great — your device can run the AI Assistant smoothly.
AI features will work but may be slow.
This device is not recommended for the on-device AI Assistant.
A second PIN that opens an empty vault — useful if someone forces you to unlock.
You can skip this and set it later from Settings → Advanced.
Two settings that protect what\'s on screen and how quickly Privora locks.
Hide Privora from screenshots, screen recording, and the recents preview. Recommended.
When you leave Privora, lock the vault after this delay.
You can change both later from Settings → Security.
Privora works fully without AI. If you turn it on, Gemma 4 runs locally for chat, summaries, photo descriptions — no data leaves your phone.
Your device may be too slow for the AI Assistant. Skip this step.
Not enough storage. Free up space and enable AI later in Settings → AI.
You can enable it later from Settings → AI.
On — features will be available across the app.
Off — Privora works fully without it.
Privora is calibrated to your device and preferences. Welcome aboard.
On-device AI is off — Privora works fully without it. You can enable it any time in Settings → AI.
Reconfigure layout, modules, and AI suitability

All your photos, videos, and files live in a vault encrypted with AES-256-GCM and a hardware-backed key. The Vault has a Hidden folder revealed by tapping its title — for content even more private than the rest.

Vitals (weight, BP, heart rate, sleep, mood), medications with reminder linking, and a private cycle tracker live together in the Health feature. Multi-profile support means you can track for yourself and family members. All on-device, all encrypted, never shared.
Settings → Backup creates an encrypted .paicbackup file you can save anywhere — Drive, USB, another phone. Importing it on a new device restores everything: photos, notes, contacts, settings.
Privora\'s AI runs Gemma 4 entirely on your phone. No prompt, no note, no photo ever leaves the device. Use ✨ in the top bar to chat, summarize, extract tasks, and create reminders by sentence.
A second PIN that opens an empty-looking vault. If anyone forces you to unlock, type the emergency PIN — they see nothing sensitive. You can also configure it to wipe specific data on entry.
Privora can replace its launcher icon with a real working calculator. Type your PIN followed by = to enter the app. Anyone snooping just sees a calculator on your home screen.
When someone enters the wrong PIN, Privora can silently snap a front-camera photo and save it to the vault. You\'ll see it the next time you unlock — no notification, no shutter sound.

Privora generates time-based 2FA codes for your accounts (the same codes Google Authenticator or Authy produce). Secrets stay on this device — encrypted with your PIN, no cloud sync. Scan a service\'s QR or paste its setup secret to add an account; tap to copy the code. Codes are wiped along with everything else if your duress PIN is used.
Couldn\'t save — vault was locked. Try again.
Microphone access denied. Enable it in system settings to record voice notes.
Couldn\'t start recording. The microphone may be in use by another app.
Enable hardware noise suppression and auto-gain on new recordings
Backup, Emergency PIN, Device Transfer, Re-index
Enter your PIN to access critical settings.
Off — tap to enable on-device AI
Download Gemma 4 E2B for on-device AI features:
• Summarize, rewrite, and extract tasks from notes
Not enough storage. Free up at least %1$s to continue.
Low RAM — AI features will be slow and may cause instability.
Recommended: 6 GB+ RAM for best experience.
2. Transfer the .paicbackup file to your new device
3. Install Privora on new device → Import backup
Permanently delete ALL data including encryption keys
All data wiped. App reset to fresh state.
